name: Finnish Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar in a mixing bowl.
2. Stir in the almond extract.
3. Gradually add 1-1/4 cups of flour, stirring until well combined.
4. Knead in the remaining flour to form dough.
5. Cover the dough and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
6. Roll out the chilled dough on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
7. Cut into desired shapes using a small cookie cutter (1-1/2 to 2 inches).
8. Place the cut cookies on ungreased baking sheets.
9. Beat the egg white until foamy and brush over each cookie.
10. Sprinkle with sugar and ground almonds.
11. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 7-8 minutes, or until lightly browned.
12. Cool the cookies on wire racks.
Yield: 4 dozen
